title: Sweet Not Savoury
description: A WIP mod expanding upon sweet-themed creatures and aesthetics
body:
Welcome to Sweet Not Savoury. This is a mod I have been working on as a hobby since 2016. In previous versions I had over 300 entities, which I plan to bring back little by little along with many other features.

ALL MOBS ONLY SPAWN IN SNOWY BIOMES.

**Tameable Mobs**
These are slightly stronger than your average Wolf. Tame them with a Candy Cane, which is crafted using Candy Cane Sugar, harvested from Candy Cane Sugar Cane, traded to you from a villager/wandering trader.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Candy Cane Cat**

  ![Candy Cane Cat (default)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98c855c7878d9ac25603ca77830aa8a6b6619751.png)
  ![Candy cane cat (apple)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b64b31de7e5cc42099e32e138140d0a2b991aea0.png)
  ![candy cane cat (ice)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22ad2ee851b22acaee28e817051183e332bec719.png)
  ![candy cane cat (peppermint)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e38a37432bd296eb8e352a7f79b3ad47257ad785.png)
  ![candy cane cat (spearmint)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a444bfec59fe5de41736f84930733e311fcda0e0.png)
  ![candy cane cat (watermelon)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14ab47716e636cf2bea5cfcd67ce0e4a8c2cdffa.png)

**Humpug**

  ![Humpug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b1cc611ea81a5b1667b659761304f02aa9c209.png)

**Mintmunk**

  ![Mintmunk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8465752fa17b9d19ad99b636b956e6225bb5e29f.png)
- You can breed and/or tempt these cats with Candy Cane Sugar.


</details>

**Ambient Mobs**
Ambient mobs drop food items, similar to how chickens drop chicken eggs. They are all leashable.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Candy Canefly**

The Candy Canefly drops Candy Canes.
  ![Candy Canefly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b034fd513bcce6768c89a0ad9d055a6a6a8257d.png)

**Mint Marshmallow Sheep**

The Mint Marshmallow Sheep drops Mint Marshmallows.
  ![Mint Marshmallow Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce319f1d0c7a4d518094afc3902e2d0bb20958f5.png)



</details>

**Hostile Mobs**
Hostile mobs are faster due to their high adrenaline. Currently, they only drop EXP!

- 7 Animated Paintings

- 7 Candy Cane Cat Plushies
